channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: The Thunder should have been quite tired. They went 2-0 in Florida anyway, pushing record to 22-5
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Here's how the last few days have gone for the Oklahoma City Thunder: Lose the NBA Cup final to Milwaukee in Las Vegas on Tuesday, spend time airborne over four different time zones on Wednesday, win in Orlando on Thursday, win in Miami on Friday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Christian Walker agrees to $60 million, 3-year contract with Astros, AP source says
item.description: Gold Glove first baseman Christian Walker and the Houston Astros agreed Friday to a $60 million, three-year contract, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press. The person spoke on condition of anonymity because the agreement was subject to a successful physical.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: World Series champion Dodgers top MLB luxury tax at $103 million as record 9 teams owe penalty
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The Los Angeles Dodgers topped a record nine teams owing Major League Baseball's luxury tax this year with an unprecedented $103 million penalty, and the $97.1 million bill for the New York Mets raises their tax total under high-spending owner Steve Cohen to nearly $229 million.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jalen Hurts fined for wearing mismatched cleats during Eagles' win over Steelers, AP source says
item.description: Philadelphia Eagles quarterback Jalen Hurts was fined $5,628 by the NFL for wearing mismatched cleats that were not “constitutional team colors,” a person familiar with the league's decision told The Associated Press on Friday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Former NFL star Michael Vick officially hired by Norfolk State on Friday
item.description: NORFOLK, Va. (AP) — Norfolk State officially named Michael Vick its head football coach Friday, the latest hire of a talented NFL player with no college coaching experience to lead an HBCU program.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Broncos show growing pains in second-half collapse to Chargers
item.description: In a pivotal Thursday Night, AFC West battle in Los Angeles with plenty of playoff implications, we saw no lack of offense.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Celtics' Jaylen Brown calls out ref for technical calls on himself, Joe Mazzulla in loss to Bulls
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Celtics forward Jaylen Brown took issue with back-to-back technical fouls called on coach Joe Mazzulla and himself late in the fourth quarter of Boston’s 117-108 loss to the Chicago Bulls.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: San Diego FC releases 2025 regular season schedule
item.description: San Diego FC will be kicking off its first regular season match in franchise history in February against a rival city.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Celtics head coach admits he'd 'rather watch something else' as NBA ratings decline
item.description: The NBA's ratings are down 25% from last season, and even Boston Celtics head coach Joe Mazzulla is part of the "problem," he admitted Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cody Bellinger experienced World Series title with dad Clay at old Yankee Stadium
item.description: Bellinger won the 2019 NL MVP award with the Los Angeles Dodgers after hitting .305 with 47 homers, 115 RBIs and a 1.035 OPS.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Ducks to honor fellow O.C. team at promotional night
item.description: If you're a fan of Orange County sports, you're in luck this January. On Jan. 7, the Anaheim Ducks are hosting Angels Night, an event that includes a baseball jersey giveaway for the first 5,000 fans in attendance. The game against the Calgary Flames begins at 7 p.m. Tickets begin at less than $30.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: Trevor Baskin: From Division II star to Division I grinder
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — From Division II standout to Division I contributor, Trevor Baskin’s basketball journey has been anything but ordinary. After excelling at Colorado Mesa University, Baskin now competes at the highest level of college basketball with the Colorado Buffaloes.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: NCAA president says there are 'less than 10' transgender athletes in college sports
item.description: NCAA President Charlie Baker said it is “debatable” whether transgender women will “always” have a physical advantage over cisgender, or non-transgender, women.
item.dc:creator: Brooke Migdon, NewsNation

item.title: Lawmaker wants Chicago women's sports teams to have an even playing field
item.description: State Rep. Eva-Dina Delgado (D-Chicago) has introduced legislation requiring equity in public stadium funding for men’s and women’s sports. Illinois lawmakers began hearings this week on the issue.
item.dc:creator: Tahman Bradley, WGN 9

item.title: Runnin' Utes roll past Florida A&M, 89-59
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utah's last home game of 2024 was a memorable one, as the Utes cruised past Florida A&M, 89-59. Mike Sharavjamts and Mason Madsen each scored 15 points off the bench to lead a balanced Utah attack. The Utes bench scored 57 points, while the starters scored 32.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: College hockey player sued by opponent over injury she suffered on the ice
item.description: A Michigan State University hockey player has been sued by a former opponent for injuries she suffered on the ice.
item.dc:creator: Matt Jaworowski, WGN 9

item.title: NBA unveils new All-Star format featuring four-team tournament
item.description: The NBA 's All-Star Game is going to be an All-Star tournament this season, with the league announcing on Tuesday that it has finalized plans to use a different format for the upcoming midseason showcase in San Francisco.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: BYU excited to face Heisman winner Travis Hunter
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - As BYU continues preparation for the Alamo Bowl December 28th against Colorado, they are looking forward to facing off against Heisman Trophy Winner Travis Hunter. Hunter is truly a one-of-a-kind player.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bucs with Bowles on team's December rise and a dominating win against the Chargers
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers continued to add pressure in the NFC South title race with a commanding 40-17 win over the Los Angeles Chargers.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Mahomes throws 2 TD passes, leaves with ankle injury in Chiefs' 21-7 win. X-rays negative on star QB
item.description: Mahomes threw two touchdown passes before limping off with an ankle injury in the fourth quarter, Xavier Worthy ran for a score and Kansas City finally had a relatively easy win, 21-7 over the mistake-prone Cleveland Browns.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 3 Utah cowboys earn world champion titles at 2024 National Finals Rodeo
item.description: Three cowboys from Utah won world champion titles at the 2024 Wrangler National Finals Rodeo in Las Vegas on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4

item.title: Freddie Freeman's walk-off grand slam ball sells for $1.56 million at auction
item.description: Freddie Freeman’s historic walk-off grand slam ball from Game 1 of the World Series has sold for $1.56 million at auction.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Cowboys cornerback Trevon Diggs set for season-ending knee surgery, AP sources say
item.description: Dallas Cowboys cornerback Trevon Diggs is set for season-ending surgery on his left knee to deal with an issue that was about to sideline him for the third time in four games, two people with knowledge of the decision said Saturday.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump, close allies attend Army-Navy rivalry game
item.description: As national concerns about the drones spotted on the East Coast continue to mount, President-elect Trump is attending the Army-Navy game.
item.dc:creator: The Hill Staff, NewsNation
